## What

Brief description of the change.

## Why

Motivation and context. Link to relevant issue or ADR if applicable.

## How

High-level summary of the approach.

## Checklist

- [ ] `make quality` passes (lint + vet + tests + coverage)
- [ ] Tests written before implementation (TDD)
- [ ] Coverage meets threshold (≥85% core, ≥90% policy/router/envelope/brain)
- [ ] Context7 consulted for any external library/API used
- [ ] ADR written for new external dependencies
- [ ] Godoc on all exported symbols
- [ ] Conventional Commit messages
